goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 10:45'.
The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 10:45
The train should depart from stevenage and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get travel time
